studies.title: Prospective randomized study on the multimodal self-treatment of psychogenic erectile dysfunction using a digital health application.

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product Kranus Edera, as it is explicitly named in the trial description and intervention details. The study evaluates the effectiveness of Kranus Edera for psychogenic erectile dysfunction.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a 'prospective randomized study', indicating that it involves random allocation of participants to different intervention groups, which is characteristic of a randomized controlled trial (RCT).

studies.title: Prospective randomized trial to evaluate a multimodal digital app in the treatment of erectile dysfunction

_verification.reason: The study specifically mentions the use of the Kranus Edera app as the intervention for erectile dysfunction, with detailed descriptions of its use in the trial.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a prospective randomized controlled trial with participants randomly allocated to an intervention group and a control group, which is the defining feature of an RCT.
